_comment: P3d round 4 — contested-definition probes. Author each gate in YOUR canonical convention, INDEPENDENTLY, and state any convention choice in 'note'. Big-endian q0=MSB, U[out,in], up to global phase. The contested axes (bit-reversal, generator sign, root phase) are NOT global phase.

intents.definition: 2-qubit Quantum Fourier Transform. Conventions differ on the final bit-reversal swap and the phase sign — author your canonical form and state your choice in note.
sqrt(SWAP): a square root of the SWAP gate. The phase/branch convention varies — author your canonical form.
Rz(pi/2): rotation about Z by pi/2. The generator-sign convention exp(-i theta Z/2) vs exp(+i theta Z/2) varies — author your canonical form and state it in note.
